REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS BALWANTSINH THAKOR AND SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN'S MOTION FOR ORDER DIRECTING SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFFS DEPARTMENT TO ENFORCE THE WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR THE PREMISES AT 1139 MARKET STREET # 228 IN SAN FRANCISCO, CA. IS OFF CALENDAR, INSUFFICIENT NOTICE PER CCP 1005 AND CCP 1013. ALSO, MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. FINALLY, THERE ARE TWO CONTRADICTING PROOFS OF SERVICE (#1 ATTACHED TO THE NOTICE OF MOTION AND #2 ATTACHED TO THE POINTS AND AUTHORITIES). PROOF OF SERVICE #2 IS SINGED UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY ON OCTOBER 21, 2015 DECLARING THAT THE PAPERS WERE SERVED ON OCTOBER 26, 2015. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Off Calendar Jan-08-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Raymond Burk for Defendant Balwantsinh Thakor the moving party.
No appearance by the opposing party.

DEFENDANT BALWANTSINH THAKOR Notice Of Motion For Order Directing San Francisco Sheriff Department To Enforce The Writ Of Possession For The Premises At 1139 Market Street #228 In San Francisco, Ca. is GRANTED. Notice Of Motion For Order Directing San Francisco Sheriffs Department To Enforce The Writ Of Possession For The Premises At 1139 Market Street # 228 In San Francisco, Ca
Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Howard Olsen, Esq. (415-931-4207) of Law Office of Michael Heath for Defendant/Moving party Balwantsinh Thakor.
No other Appearance.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Defendant argues they do not need to serve. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS BALWANTSINH THAKOR and SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN's Motion For Order Directing San Francisco Sheriffs Department To Enforce The Writ Of Possession For The Premises At 1139 Market Street # 228 In San Francisco, Ca. is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Also, moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers. Finally, there are two contradicting proofs of service (#1 attached to the Notice of Motion and #2 attached to the Points and Authorities). Proof of Service #2 is singed under penalty of perjury on October 21, 2015 declaring that the papers were served on October 26, 2015. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
